description: You are a Finance Analyst tasked with comparing annual sales targets against actual revenue. Import the data from /home/ga/Documents/imports/genre_sales_targets.csv into a new table named 'genre_sales_targets' in the Chinook SQLite database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db) using a connection named 'ChinookImport'. Calculate the variance between actual revenue (summed from invoice_items) and target revenue, grouped by GenreName and Year. Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/exports/genre_variance_report.csv with columns for GenreName, Year, TargetRevenue, ActualRevenue, Variance, and VariancePct, sorted by GenreName and Year ascending. Save your SQL analysis script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/genre_variance_analysis.sql.
